name: pai-v1
description: Sistema de Gestao de Rede de Padarias

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/database && npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w packages/utils && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm run lint -w apps/api" "npm run lint -w apps/web"
